name: Controlling Motion Transfer in Diffusion Transformers via Attention Heads
summary: arXiv:2607.11081v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have advanced video generation with high-quality, temporally coherent results. However, extending them to motion tran...
description: arXiv:2607.11081v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have advanced video generation with high-quality, temporally coherent results. However, extending them to motion transfer, which requires following reference motion while aligning with a target prompt, remains challenging due to limited understanding of motion and structure representations within DiTs. We analyze vi...
author: Sunyoung Jung, Jiwoo Park, Yoonseok Choi, Kyobin Choo, Ming-Hsuan Yang, Seong Jae Hwang
